    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class domain.CycleStatus
    Cycle is active and tracking expenses normally.
    alertManager - Variable in class control.ExpenseManager
    Responsible for checking budget thresholds after each expense.
    AlertManager - Class in control
    Monitors budget thresholds and sends notifications when spending milestones are reached.
    AlertManager() - Constructor for class control.AlertManager
    Constructs an AlertManager backed by the singleton DatabaseHelper.
    allowanceField - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Input field for the total budget allowance in EGP.
    amount - Variable in class domain.Expense
    Monetary amount of the expense in EGP.
    amountField - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Input field for the expense amount in EGP.
    AmountRenderer - Class in util
    Table cell renderer for the Amount column in the expense history table.
    AmountRenderer() - Constructor for class util.AmountRenderer
    Constructs an AmountRenderer with default settings.
    app - package app
     
    app - Variable in class ui.BaseScreen
    Application facade used to trigger navigation and business logic.
    App - Class in app
    Central application controller and facade for the Mizan budget app.
    App() - Constructor for class app.App
    Constructs the App, initialises all managers, applies the dark theme, creates the main window, and routes to the correct startup screen.
    AppColors - Class in util
    Centralised colour palette for the Mizan dark theme.
    AppColors() - Constructor for class util.AppColors
    Utility class — do not instantiate.
    applyFilter() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Applies the active category filter to the table row sorter.
    authManager - Variable in class app.App
    Handles PIN authentication and lockout logic.
    AuthManager - Class in control
    Manages PIN-based authentication and lockout logic for the application.
    AuthManager() - Constructor for class control.AuthManager
    Constructs an AuthManager and resets the failed-attempt counter.
